changes.reason: Added Sunday hours to accommodate increased Sunday calls
Updated backup on-call contact phone number

changes.old_value: a technician will call back within 20 minutes
changes.new_value: a technician will call back within 30 minutes
changes.reason: Adjusted callback time to a more realistic 30 minutes

changes.old_value: do not book jobs for commercial properties without checking with Donna first
changes.new_value: do not book any jobs automatically, all bookings require manual review
changes.reason: Tightened rules to require manual review for all bookings due to no-show issues

changes.old_value: be warm and friendly, do not put people on hold for more than 30 seconds
changes.new_value: be warm and friendly, do not put people on hold for more than 30 seconds, always ask the caller if they're a new or existing customer
changes.reason: Added required question to prioritize customer calls

summary: Updated business hours to include Sundays, changed backup on-call contact to Marcus Webb, adjusted emergency fallback callback time to 30 minutes, tightened integration constraints to require manual review for all bookings, and added a required question to prioritize customer calls
